title: Navigation Bar — Flexbox Layout
description: Build a navigation bar using Flexbox. Create a .nav class with display: flex to lay out links horizontally, set justify-content to space items, align-items to center them vertically, and give it a background-color. Style the .nav a links with padding, color, and text-decoration: none. Add a :hover effect so links respond to user interaction.
test_code:
assert 'display' in css.lower() and 'flex' in css.lower(), 'Missing display: flex on .nav'
assert 'justify-content' in css.lower(), 'Missing justify-content on .nav'
assert '.nav' in css.lower(), 'Missing .nav selector'
assert 'text-decoration' in css.lower(), 'Missing text-decoration on .nav a'
assert ':hover' in css.lower(), 'Missing :hover pseudo-class for nav link interaction'
acceptance_criteria: .nav uses display: flex with justify-content and align-items
.nav a links have padding, color, and text-decoration: none
hints: justify-content: space-around or space-between distributes nav links evenly
align-items: center vertically centers items in the flex container
For hover, try changing background-color or adding an underline with border-bottom
